notes: Reworks the active fixed-site UI toward the approved option-one mockup with a true sidebar shell, calmer earthy color balance, lighter icon treatment, and friendlier typography.
Adds file-based background textures for the shell, green panels, and cream cards so the home experience feels organic without the previous hokey cross-line patterns.
Restyles the home dashboard, seasonal highlight cards, search, support panels, and navigation for closer sample fidelity while preserving the existing route structure and live app behavior.
